title: Meituan LongCat 2.0 (Tested): China's 1.6T OPEN MODEL looks CRAZY!
summary: Meituan released LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model trained for long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks. The model activates approximately 48 billion parameters per token and was trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than traditional GPU setups. Official benchmarks show strong performance on agentic coding and reasoning tasks, though independent testing showed mixed results on coding tasks.
writeup: The video examines Meituan's LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model that activates roughly 48 billion parameters per token and targets long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks. A notable detail is its training on AI ASIC superpods rather than conventional GPU setups. Official benchmarks report strong results on agentic coding and reasoning, but the channel's independent testing produced mixed outcomes on coding tasks.
